# panos_zone_protection_profile (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `location` (Attributes) The location of this object. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--location))
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `asymmetric_path` (String) actions for TCP sliding window tracking errors, also control enable/disable TCP sequence number check for FIN/RST
- `description` (String)
- `discard_icmp_error` (Boolean) Discard ICMP embedded with error message
- `discard_icmp_frag` (Boolean) Discard ICMP fragment
- `discard_icmp_large_packet` (Boolean) Discard Large ICMP packet (IP length > 1024B)
- `discard_icmp_ping_zero_id` (Boolean) Discard ICMP Ping with zero ID
- `discard_ip_frag` (Boolean) Discard IP fragment
- `discard_ip_spoof` (Boolean) Discard spoofed IP packet
- `discard_loose_source_routing` (Boolean) Discard packets with loose source routing IP option
- `discard_malformed_option` (Boolean) Discard packets with malformed IP option
- `discard_overlapping_tcp_segment_mismatch` (Boolean) Discard sessions with mismatch tcp overlapping segment
- `discard_record_route` (Boolean) Discard packets with Record Route IP option
- `discard_security` (Boolean) Discard packets with Security IP option
- `discard_stream_id` (Boolean) Discard packets with Stream ID IP option
- `discard_strict_source_routing` (Boolean) Discard packets with strict source routing IP option
- `discard_tcp_split_handshake` (Boolean) Discard tcp split handshake packet
- `discard_tcp_syn_with_data` (Boolean) Discard tcp syn packet with data payload
- `discard_tcp_synack_with_data` (Boolean) Discard tcp syn ack packet with data payload
- `discard_timestamp` (Boolean) Discard packets with Timestmp IP option
- `discard_unknown_option` (Boolean) Discard packets with unknown IP option
- `flood` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--flood))
- `ipv6` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ipv6))
- `l2_sec_group_tag_protection` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--l2_sec_group_tag_protection))
- `net_inspection` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--net_inspection))
- `non_ip_protocol` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--non_ip_protocol))
- `remove_tcp_timestamp` (Boolean) Remove TCP Timestamp
- `scan` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scan))
- `scan_white_list` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--scan_white_list))
- `strict_ip_check` (Boolean) Perform strict IP address check
- `strip_mptcp_option` (String) strip mptcp option
- `strip_tcp_fast_open_and_data` (Boolean) Strip tcp fast option and data payload
- `suppress_icmp_needfrag` (Boolean) Do not reply ICMP NEEDFRAG (layer3 only)
- `suppress_icmp_timeexceeded` (Boolean) Do not reply ICMP TTL expired error (layer3 only)
- `tcp_reject_non_syn` (String) reject non-SYN TCP packet for session setup

Optional:

- `options_invalid_ipv6_discard` (Boolean) Drop packets with invalid IPv6 options in extension header

- `routing_header_1` (Boolean) Drop packets with type 1 routing header
